title: pectocarya anomala
intro: Pectocarya anomala, also known as Whitestem or White-stemmed Pectocarya, is a small annual herb in the borage family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pectocarya anomala include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs and colds, and promote wound healing. Pectocarya anomala can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for various herbal remedies.
